name: Shimla Manali Tour
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Shimla, Manali with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Delhi to Shimla (350 Kms
itinerary.description: Delhi to Shimla (350 Kms. 7/8 Hrs. approx.): Arrival at Delhi Airport/railway station company representative assist you and proceed to Shimla & Stay at hotel.

itinerary.title: Shimla Kufri & local sightseeing: After breakfast,
itinerary.description: Shimla Kufri & local sightseeing: After breakfast, . Kufri is also renowned for other adventure activities such as skiing, tobogganing (sliding downhill on a sled), etc. Kufri has the oldest skiing slopes in Himachal Pradesh. You can also take a hike or a Pony up to Mashu Peak(Direct payment basis), Afternoon: Guests will be dropped at the Shimla elevator & explore by themselves. Attractions of the mall road include Shimla Church, Scandal Point, Gaiety Theater, Town hall, Jaku Temple & shopping.

itinerary.title: Shimla to Manali (240 Kms
itinerary.description: Shimla to Manali (240 Kms. 8 Hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast proceed to Manali on the way to the Kullu valley, Enjoy river rafting(direct payment basis). Overnight stay at the hotel

itinerary.title: Today after breakfast, proceed to visit Solang Valley, Hadimba Temple, Vashisht
itinerary.description: Today after breakfast, proceed to visit Solang Valley, Hadimba Temple, Vashisht Temple, Monastery, Mall road, Van vihar. Overnight stay at the hotel

itinerary.description:

itinerary.title: After breakfast at the hotel, proceed for a half day excursion to Kufri (2500mts
itinerary.description: After breakfast at the hotel, proceed for a half day excursion to Kufri (2500mts). Kufri is also renowned for other adventure activities such as skiing, tobogganing (sliding downhill on a sled), etc. Kufri has the oldest skiing slopes in Himachal Pradesh. You can also take a hike or a Pony up to Mashu Peak(own cost direct payment basis). Afternoon: Guests will be dropped at the Shimla elevator & explore by themselves. Attractions of the mall road include Shimla Church, Scandal Point, Gaiety Thea

itinerary.title: Shimla – Manali (240 Kms
itinerary.description: Shimla – Manali (240 Kms. 8 Hrs. approx.):After breakfast at the hotel, depart for Manali. Drive past Beas-Sutlej Link project, Pandoh Dam & En-Rout halt Kullu Valley (Boat ride-Direct payment basis) . Lunch shall be en-route on direct payment basis. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: After breakfast go for a full day excursion to Solang valley day tour, Solang Va
itinerary.description: After breakfast go for a full day excursion to Solang valley day tour, Solang Valley with its rolling meadows, ski slopes and paragliding activities ( Own cost-Direct payment basis),  Overnight stay at the hotel. *Optional Tour with extra paid: Atul tunel, Sissu, Rohtang pas

itinerary.description: After Breakfast, Proceed for local sightseeing of Manali. visit Vashishtha Kund & Hadimba Temple, Van Vihar, Tibetan Monastery & Mall Road. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Shimla Kufri & local sightseeing: Today after breakfast proceed to Kufri Valley,
itinerary.description: Shimla Kufri & local sightseeing: Today after breakfast proceed to Kufri Valley, located 16 KM from Shimla- it commands a panoramic view of the majestic Himalaya. Back to Shimla visit Jakhu Temple ( Either by walk or through Horse at personal cost) Temple dedicated to Hanuman, from where you enjoy an excellent view of Shimla. Back to the hotel, evening free . Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.description: Shimla – Manali: Today after breakfast proceed to Manali on the way to visit Kullu. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.description: Manali – Today after breakfast, proceed to visit Hidimba Temple, Vashisth Temple, Club House and go back to the hotel in the evening for a walking tour. Rest of the day at leisure.
